steps.name: qa-harness-baseline
steps.summary: Added RF-FIP production API smoke script and recorded baseline evidence. Policy hook, typecheck, Vite build, server bundle, and API smoke passed; sandbox EPERM caution is recorded in scripts/rules.md.

steps.name: browser-e2e-unblock
steps.blocked_reason: Browser plugin cannot open local RF-FIP URLs. Both http://127.0.0.1:3322/ and http://localhost:3322/ returned net::ERR_BLOCKED_BY_CLIENT while the production server /api/health endpoint was reachable from PowerShell.
steps.summary: Production server health passed on a smoke DB, but Browser plugin local URL access remains environment-blocked. Per user request, continue only with independent non-browser steps.

steps.name: excel-import-parser
steps.summary: Added client import parser with CSV/TSV/JSON/TXT plus dependency-free .xlsx sheet row extraction. Import review now builds candidates from ParsedImportSource materials. Parser smoke passed for 3 CSV sources and 2 XLSX sources; .xls remains a legacy binary hold path until a parser dependency is approved.

steps.name: sqlite-store-backend
steps.summary: Replaced JSON file store with node:sqlite-backed rf-fip.sqlite collection storage, preserving API contracts and adding legacy rf-fip.json migration when SQLite is empty. Typecheck, Vite build, server bundle, and restart persistence SQLite smoke passed.

steps.name: import-workflow-hardening
steps.summary: Verified Import workflow hardening: signature-similarity duplicate detection, hold candidate promotion, and Import history UI/state wiring. Typecheck and Vite build passed; browser E2E remains environment-blocked from Step 1.

steps.name: gauss-adapter-contract
steps.summary: Completed server-owned Gauss adapter contract for offsite work: local deterministic provider, gauss blocked contract, /api/llm/* server API, client wrapper types, docs, and LLM adapter smoke. Real Gauss calls remain intentionally blocked until internal API URL/key/schema/file/timeout/error contracts are available.

steps.name: release-shape-and-git
steps.blocked_reason: Git repository/remote decision required. git status failed because _analysis_rf_platform_ux is not a git repository.
steps.summary: Release/handoff records were updated and validation passed, but commit/push cannot proceed until the work is moved to a real Git repository or this folder is initialized and connected to a remote.
